name: unsplash
author: changerawr
description: Browse and insert high-quality images from Unsplash directly into your markdown. Requires free Unsplash API key.

settings.label: **Unsplash API Key**
settings.description: Your Unsplash API Access Key. Get one free at [unsplash.com/developers](https://unsplash.com/developers) - **will be encrypted** when stored

settings.label: **Image Quality & Size**
settings.description: Controls both the downloaded image quality from Unsplash and the display size in your markdown

settings.label: **Include Photo Attribution**
settings.description: Add photographer credit as caption (*required* by [Unsplash guidelines](https://unsplash.com/license)) - if you have **Unsplash+** you can turn this off
